definition: big SAM x unique x revenue-feasible
notes: Plan Section 1: operator is the only judge. Weights: SOM 0.09 -> 0.25 (operator's stated revenue priority), genius 0.30 -> 0.22 (tied with SOM). v5.1.0 de-franchise (LIVE per operator): the 0.20 originality budget splits into derivative_distance 0.12 (corpus-novelty) + standalone_ip 0.08 (franchise-independence) so concepts that lean on pre-existing IP rank lower. standalone_ip_flag flows from empirical_genius.detect_standalone_ip into the score vector; franchise concepts are also hard-filtered out of the investor slate.
